heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Increasing chance of rain showers from the southwest, spreading northeast overnight. South of I-89 by midnight. Lows in the 40s, near 50 around the northern border. Light southeast wind, with gusty conditions developing over the southern hills and Adirondacks, up to 20 mph.

heading: Sunday
text: Widespread rain showers spreading into the northeast by the morning. Persistent rain becomes more showery in the afternoon, tapering off before dark. Highs from the upper 40s in the higher terrain, low 50s in the low lying areas, mid 50s southeast. Southeast wind at 5 to 10 mph, gusting 20 to 25 mph over the higher elevations.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Lingering showers decreasing west to east overnight. Showers return to the Adirondacks after midnight, crossing the Greens before the early morning. Lows through the 40s, nearing 50 in the Champlain Valley.
